descriptions.text: The Addams Family is a pinball machine released in March 1992. It was designed by Pat Lawlor and Larry DeMar and released by Midway (under the Bally label). It was based on the 1991 film of the same name, and features speech (taken from the film) by Anjelica Huston and custom speech specifically recorded for the game by Raul Julia. It is the best-selling solid state pinball machine of all time with 20,270 units sold.
